---
name: 💡 Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for Lazarus
title: "[idea] "
labels: enhancement
---

**What problem are you trying to solve?**
The situation or pain point. (e.g. "When I run discovery on a monorepo, …")

**What would you like Lazarus to do?**
Your proposed behavior or capability.

**Alternatives you've considered**
Anything you've tried or other approaches.

**Anything else?**
Context, examples, or a link to a repo where this would help.
